## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] The app launches and the change works (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Scoped to one change; no unrelated reformatting
- [ ] No company names, internal tools, customer data, or secrets added (sample/docs stay generic)
- [ ] UI/UX changes were discussed in an issue first
